Title: Increases the occupancy tax in the county of St. Lawrence
Summary: Increases the occupancy tax in the county of St. Lawrence from three to five percent.
LawCode: Ren §1202-l to be §1202-ll, amd §1202-ll, Tax L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the tax law, in relation to increasing the occupancy tax in the county of St. Lawrence
